---
title: "07b — Modern DiD Estimators (Multi-Figure)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
```

```{r libraries}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(fect)
```

## Run modern DiD estimators for each figure

```{r estimate-all}
did_methods <- c("cs_notyet", "iw", "didm", "twfe")
did_labels  <- c(cs_notyet = "Callaway & Sant'Anna",
                 iw        = "Sun & Abraham",
                 didm      = "de Chaisemartin & D'Haultfoeuille",
                 twfe      = "Dynamic TWFE")

for (fig_key in names(FIGURES)) {
  fig <- FIGURES[[fig_key]]
  panel_path <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, paste0("did_panel_", fig_key, ".parquet"))

  if (!file.exists(panel_path)) {
    message("Panel not found for ", fig$name, ", skipping.")
    next
  }

  message("\n", strrep("=", 60))
  message("Modern DiD estimation for: ", fig$name, " (", fig_key, ")")
  message(strrep("=", 60))

  panel <- as.data.table(read_parquet(panel_path))
  message("Panel: ", nrow(panel), " rows, ",
          uniqueN(panel$newspaper_id), " newspapers")

  # --- Fit did_wrapper models ---
  for (method in did_methods) {
    model_path <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("did_", method, "_", fig_key, ".rds"))

    if (file.exists(model_path)) {
      message("  ", did_labels[method], " model already exists, skipping.")
      next
    }

    message("  Fitting ", did_labels[method], " ...")
    out <- tryCatch({
      extra_args <- list(
        data   = as.data.frame(panel),
        Y      = "incivil_rate_rf",
        D      = "treated",
        index  = c("newspaper_id", "time_id"),
        method = method
      )
      # Add extra args for de Chaisemartin & D'Haultfoeuille
      if (method == "didm") {
        extra_args$didm.effects <- 6
        extra_args$didm.placebo <- 3
      }
      do.call(did_wrapper, extra_args)
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("    ERROR: ", e$message)
      NULL
    })

    if (!is.null(out)) {
      saveRDS(out, model_path)
      avg <- out$est.avg
      message("    ATT = ", round(avg$ATT.avg, 4),
              ", SE = ", round(avg$S.E., 4))
    }

    rm(out); gc()
  }

  rm(panel); gc()
}

message("\n\nAll modern DiD models complete.")
```

## Results summary

```{r results-summary}
# Extract ATT from did_wrapper objects
extract_did_att <- function(model, label) {
  avg <- model$est.avg
  data.table(
    Model    = label,
    ATT      = round(avg$ATT.avg, 4),
    SE       = round(avg$S.E., 4),
    CI_lower = round(avg$CI.lower, 4),
    CI_upper = round(avg$CI.upper, 4),
    p_value  = round(avg$p.value, 4)
  )
}

for (fig_key in names(FIGURES)) {
  fig <- FIGURES[[fig_key]]
  message("\n--- ", fig$name, " ---")

  results_list <- list()
  for (method in did_methods) {
    model_path <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("did_", method, "_", fig_key, ".rds"))
    if (file.exists(model_path)) {
      m <- readRDS(model_path)
      results_list[[method]] <- extract_did_att(m, did_labels[method])
      rm(m); gc()
    }
  }

  if (length(results_list) > 0) {
    results <- rbindlist(results_list)
    print(results)
  } else {
    message("  No models found.")
  }
}
```
